parameters: I think Ann’s somewhere around here, Sora. Let’s ask people here, maybe someone’s seen her
I already told you, stop throwing trash into the river!
Jeez, you’re noisy, kid. Where else am I supposed to throw it?
Why should I pay money just to throw away garbage?
Shut up, you annoying old man.
You want me to hit you right here??
Ugh. I heard you the first time, Zuko. You don't
Hi, Ann. Arguing with low-IQ people again?
I dunno, Sora... they never stop
Such low-quality people... how are we supposed to reach Golden Firsta 2054 like this?
You're right, bu It's quiet here. At least until you showed
You're just too energetic for your own good. Anyway,
You guys never come here together unless you broke
Wow, she knows us too well.
It's not hard. Zuko is talking way too fast, and
A little. What did you do this time?
He just dumped stinky mine waste near the coast
because the adults told him to!
I'm sorry! They made me do it because of my poison
Sora... Firsta is already messy enough!
You shouldn't just listen to everything they say! Look
how gross the water is getting!
See? I told you Ann would be mad!
I'm not MAD! I'm just... annoyed! You guys have to
But actually... we wanted to talk to you about
So you two are finally talking about it.
Of course I knew! I've read about it before!
Then why didn't you say anything!?
Because you guys always turn everything into a silly
It's serious! It's the part of you that keeps
you steady when the world gets scary
That sounds kind of hard to find.
It probably is. But if \C[2]Elementor\C[0] and
\C[4]Elementa\C[0] are real... I don't want to just
sit here and wait for them to ruin our home.
Just... don't make it weird, Zuko. If you act like a
goofball during our trip, I'll hit you!
I promise nothing! Come on, we need to get Gin next!
Hey Sora, I think Ann’s at the beach
Shhh, keep your voice down a bit, kiddo! You’re louder than the merchants!
Ohh? You wanna buy something too? Hehe.
Wahh, you surprised me, kiddo! What do you need?
Careful there, tiny one! The market’s super crowded today!
Hey hey, don’t touch that! It’s fragile, little guy!
Aww, aren’t you adorable? Did you get lost?
Huh? Oh, hey little buddy! Don’t run around too much here, okay?
Haha, you’ve got a lotta energy, huh little kid?
Hey kid, you lookin’ for Ann? She’s over there at the far end
Fresh fruitsss! Sweet and juicy fruitsss! Come take a look, little buddy!
Hey kiddo, wanna buy some snacks? I’ve got the tastiest ones in the whole market
COME ONNN, LET’S RUN AWAY FROM THEMMM!
I-I can’t swimmm, what do we dooo?!
GINNN, YOU CANNN! USE YOUR POWERRR!
COME ONNN GINN, YOU CAN DO ITTT!
DO YOU WANNA DIE AND GET EATEN BY THE ELEMENTAAA?!
WE’RE ALL RIGHT HEREE, YOU CAN TOTALLY DO ITTT!
O-Okayyy... \FX<FC, hard shake>I DON’T WANNA DIEEEE!
*You can now switch the party leader through \C[1]the Tag menu and by Press Q or Square or Y
*\C[1]Interact to water\C[0] to activate Gin's Skill
